calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Canatella for George Maillard.

The Court waived any irregulatory with notice based upon the second supplemental declaration of Mr. Canatella and George Maillard regarding notice being duly given. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Jackson.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-18-2009 Continued To Apr-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Canatella for George Maillard.

Mr. Canatella stated that Guatemala law stated that the will had to be written in Spanish, that property needed to be in Guatamela, that this was not a will under California law and that it did not meet the requirements under Probate Code 6110 or 6111. In addition, he stated that his client was the only one that could administer the estate as he was the only one in San Francisco, that he had priorty and that he would be fully bonded. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
